name: voice-status-update
description: Voice (Whisper) transcription + agent response. The transcript is the userMessage match.

response.text: Give me a status update on the urgent issues

match.userMessage: Give me a status update on the urgent issues

response.content: Three urgent issues — Safari payments (in progress), Postgres pool (in progress), Slack dedupe (in progress). All assigned, all on track for end of week.
